title: Sweden and ICRISAT "Enhancing incomes, Reducing poverty, Improving lives"
abstract:
The goal of the International Crops Research Institute for
the Semi-Arid Tropics (ICRISAT) is to harness the power
of technology for development, food security, poverty
alleviation and environmental protection, targeted at
poor rural families in the semi-arid tropics (SAT) of the
world. But ICRISAT cannot do this alone. Countries, such
as Sweden, help ICRISAT achieve this goal through their
support and encouragement, as well as through financial
assistance...
